summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Global Access Shipping website. Backend APIs are fully functional with 100% test success rate. Frontend has basic functionality working but contains React Select component errors that prevent full form interactions.

ui_bugs.issue: React Select.Item components have empty string values causing runtime errors
ui_bugs.error_message: A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string

integration_issues.issue: Form submission blocked by Select component errors

passed_tests: Landing page loads with tracking search functionality
Dashboard navigation and basic stats display
Shipments page loads with proper admin controls
Users management page accessible to admin
All backend API endpoints (22/22 tests passed)
Tracking events and status updates working
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix React Select component errors in CreateEditShipmentPage.jsx and ShipmentDetailPage.jsx. The Select.Item components should not have empty string values. Replace empty string values with meaningful defaults or handle empty states properly.
